lessons.title: Introduction to dplyr and the Pipe
lessons.description: Learn about the dplyr package for data manipulation and the pipe operator %>%.

lessons.title: Filtering Rows with filter() and slice()
lessons.description: Select rows based on conditions or positions using filter() and slice().

lessons.title: Selecting Columns with select()
lessons.description: Choose, rename, or drop columns using select() and helper functions.

lessons.title: Creating New Columns with mutate() and transmute()
lessons.description: Add new variables or modify existing ones using mutate().

lessons.title: Summarising Data with summarise() and group_by()
lessons.description: Compute summary statistics for groups using group_by() and summarise().
